description:
Create a House of Quality (QFD) diagram in EdrawMax for a new 'Pro Laptop' project. The diagram should be titled 'Pro Laptop QFD Matrix' and include the following specifications:

Customer Requirements (Rows): 'Instant Wake-up', 'All-Day Battery', 'Sunlight Readability'.
Technical Descriptors (Columns): 'NVMe SSD Storage', '99Wh Battery Pack', '1000-nit Mini-LED'.

Relationships:
- 'Instant Wake-up' vs 'NVMe SSD Storage': Strong
- 'All-Day Battery' vs '99Wh Battery Pack': Strong
- 'Sunlight Readability' vs '1000-nit Mini-LED': Strong
- 'All-Day Battery' vs '1000-nit Mini-LED': Weak

Correlations:
- '99Wh Battery Pack' vs '1000-nit Mini-LED': Negative Correlation

Save the diagram as an EdrawMax file to ~/Documents/laptop_qfd.eddx and export it as a PDF to ~/Documents/laptop_qfd.pdf.
